title: I like my mobs melted (Tconstruct datapack)
description: Datapack with entity melting recipes for Tinkers' Construct and mobs from various mods (Alex's mobs , Alex's Caves ..)
body:
This datapack adds entity melting recipes for mobs from the following mods:

- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- Quark
- [Let's do] Vinery
- [Let's do] Meadow
- Crabber's delight
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Supplementaries
- Mekanism Additions


Some of the mobs were not provided with a melting recipe, because I either felt it would be too cruel, or just couldn't think of a fitting liquid. Anyway, I did my best thinking of recipes for nearly over a 100 mobs. **You can use this datapack in your modpack/server**, but, please, do not reupload it with minor changes/additions.
